name: 11L XSA4 + EMA + Partial RoPE + Rank-8 TTT Hooks
author: Divyesh Thirukonda
blurb: PR315-derived 11-layer XSA4/EMA/Partial-RoPE stack with mixed int6/int8 export and zstd compression. The submitted score is the exact roundtrip metric from the completed seed-42 8xH100 run: 1.15910316 bpb at 15,528,215 total bytes.
